name: omni-space
description: Omni-Space: A Unified, P2P, Cross-Device Window Manager

scripts.dev:all: concurrently --kill-others "npm run dev -w signaling-server" "npm run dev -w desktop" "npm run dev -w mobile-pwa"
scripts.build:all: npm run build -w signaling-server && npm run build -w desktop && npm run build -w mobile-pwa
